translations.en: uJohann
an uneasy looking bard.
translations.zh: 一名神色侷促之吟遊詩人。

translations.en: "Oh, hello. Can I help you with something?"
translations.zh: 「噢，您好。可有什麼需在下效勞？」

translations.en: "They call me '@Yodeling Johann.'"
"I sing @songs for the @pira - for the @sailors here."
translations.zh: 「我為這裡的@songs（海盜）——呃，@pira（水手）——獻@sailors（歌）。」

translations.en: "But I'm looking for a chance to @move to another town."
"They're fine, hearty fellows, one and all."
translations.zh: 「個個皆為良善之士，無一例外。」

translations.en: "I'd better not..."
"I've still got bruises from the last time I tried yodeling around here."
translations.zh: 「上回在此處吟唱山歌的瘀青尚未消退。」

translations.en: "Not that there are @pirates around here or anything..."
"The salty air just doesn't agree with me."
"Did I say pirates? I didn't say that." He looks around nervously.
translations.zh: 「我說海盜了？我可沒這麼說。」他緊張地環顧四周。

translations.en: "Nobody but fine honest sailors around here."
He lowers his voice. "By the way..."
"If you should happen to run across Bonn, or Ybarra, or Hawkins, don't tell them I'm here."
translations.zh: 「汝若巧遇邦恩、伊巴拉或霍金斯，莫告知我在此處。」

translations.en: "Who's he? Never 'eard of 'im."
He spits on the ground and then says, "What?"
"Oh, a loon with a spoon
Sang a song of @ballooning.
And the man in the moon
Said it was quite a tune."
"Now one fine day in June
A young man went @ballooning.
Did he rise up to glory
Or fall to his doom?"
"Just one thing will I say
Of the sport of @ballooning:
On the ground will I stay
While the ground still has room!"
"Oh, that's just some nonsense that gave me an idea for a song..."
translations.zh: 「噢，那不過是激發我寫歌之靈感的胡謅之言……」

translations.en: "I read about it in a book at the @Lycaeum."
"Ask the librarian there for help."
"Good day."
"I don't think it would be a good idea to talk about that..."

translator_notes: Johann = 海盜窟膽小詩人，劇情點：他在 Lycaeum 讀到熱氣球設計，提示玩家如何造氣球到地下世界。歌詞翻譯保留 ABAB 韻律感（潛鳥/月人/六月/熱氣球）。
